features.name: implicit wire width propagated from submodule port
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an implicit wire (undeclared signal) is passed to a submodule port that has an explicit width specification, and then the implicit wire is used in a continuous assignment in the parent module

features.name: implicit wire used in continuous assignment after submodule instantiation
features.description: Code should include an implicit wire that is passed as a submodule port connection and then used in a continuous assignment expression in the instantiating module
